perturbation.original_text: 1.1 "Product" or "Products" mean those nanomaterials, coated nanomaterials and dispersions of nanomaterials listed in Schedule A, as amended from time to time by mutual written agreement signed by the parties.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.1 "Product" or "Goods" mean those nanomaterials, coated nanomaterials and dispersions of nanomaterials listed in Schedule A, as amended from time to time by mutual written agreement signed by the parties.
perturbation.explanation: The term "Product" is being changed to "Goods" in the definition, which creates a contradiction because the rest of the document refers to "Products", while the definition now states "Goods". This creates an in-text contradiction where the terms are being used interchangeably and makes it unclear if "Goods" and "Products" mean the same thing throughout the document.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.1 NTC hereby grants to ALFA AESAR, and its subsidiaries and affiliates, the exclusive right to market, sell and distribute Research Quantities of the Products within the Territory, ALFA AESAR hereby accepts such right and agrees to use its reasonable efforts to promote the marketing, sale and distribution of Research Quantities of the Products throughout the Territory in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement using normal and standard practices. ALFA AESAR shall have the right, in its sole discretion, to sell Products outside of the Territory. ALFA AESAR agrees that, so long as NTC provides ALFA AESAR with Products for ALFA AESAR' S marketing, sale and distribution of Research Quantities of the Products within the Territory, ALFA AESAR shall purchase all its requirements of the Products (including nanomaterials with physical or chemical properties substantially the same as the Products) exclusively from NTC during the term of this Agreement, ALFA AESAR shall: i) buy the Products in quantities listed in Schedule A and repackage into the research sample quantities as it deems reasonable and appropriate for distribution and sale on a worldwide basis at such resale prices it shall determine from time to time, provided that any such repackaging shall comply with applicable safety laws and regulations; ii) attempt to keep reasonably sufficient stocks of the Products to meet customer orders and to store such stocks in such conditions as NTC may recommend from time to time to prevent deterioration or damage.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces "Product" with "Goods" in the definition, while Section 2.1 continues to refer exclusively to "Products". This creates a clear contradiction because the contract now uses two different terms ("Goods" and "Products") seemingly interchangeably, but only one ("Products") is used in the main operational clause (2.1). It is unclear if 'Goods' and 'Products' have the same meaning throughout the document, creating ambiguity about which term applies to the marketing, sale, and distribution obligations outlined in Section 2.1. This aligns with the 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: 3.1 Subject to Section 2.2, NTC shall sell Products to ALFA AESAR, at the Product Price as amended from time to time pursuant to this Section 3.1. NTC agrees that the Product Prices, benefits and allowances offered to ALFA AESAR shall not be less favorable than those offered on Products provided to agents, distributors or marketed directly by NTC to any customers, other than the Product Prices existing as of the date of this Agreement with NTC's commercial partners. Subject to the preceding sentence, NTC may increase the Product Price set forth in Schedule A at the end of the first full calendar year of this Agreement and from year to year thereafter, by providing ALFA AESAR with 90 days prior written notice of the changes to the 2 Product Prices. Any such increase in the Product Price shall not be effective for any unshipped portion of an order previously placed by ALFA AESAR prior to the end of the calendar year in which such notice is provided. NTC may decrease the Product Price at any time by providing ALFA AESAR with 30 days prior written notice.
perturbation.changed_text: 3.1 Subject to Section 2.2, NTC shall sell Products to ALFA AESAR, at the Retail Price as amended from time to time pursuant to this Section 3.1. NTC agrees that the Retail Prices, benefits and allowances offered to ALFA AESAR shall not be less favorable than those offered on Products provided to agents, distributors or marketed directly by NTC to any customers, other than the Retail Prices existing as of the date of this Agreement with NTC's commercial partners. Subject to the preceding sentence, NTC may increase the Retail Price set forth in Schedule A at the end of the first full calendar year of this Agreement and from year to year thereafter, by providing ALFA AESAR with 90 days prior written notice of the changes to the 2 Retail Prices. Any such increase in the Retail Price shall not be effective for any unshipped portion of an order previously placed by ALFA AESAR prior to the end of the calendar year in which such notice is provided. NTC may decrease the Product Price at any time by providing ALFA AESAR with 30 days prior written notice.
perturbation.explanation: The term "Product Price" is being changed to "Retail Price" in Section 3.1. However, at the end of the paragraph it continues to state "NTC may decrease the Product Price at any time by providing ALFA AESAR with 30 days prior written notice." This creates an internal contradiction as the paragraph starts by defining it as "Retail Price" but ends by using "Product Price" within the same context, creating confusion about which price is being referred to.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1 Subject to Section 2.2, NTC shall sell Products to ALFA AESAR, at the Retail Price as amended from time to time pursuant to this Section 3.1. NTC agrees that the Retail Prices, benefits and allowances offered to ALFA AESAR shall not be less favorable than those offered on Products provided to agents, distributors or marketed directly by NTC to any customers, other than the Retail Prices existing as of the date of this Agreement with NTC's commercial partners. Subject to the preceding sentence, NTC may increase the Retail Price set forth in Schedule A at the end of the first full calendar year of this Agreement and from year to year thereafter, by providing ALFA AESAR with 90 days prior written notice of the changes to the 2 Retail Prices. Any such increase in the Retail Price shall not be effective for any unshipped portion of an order previously placed by ALFA AESAR prior to the end of the calendar year in which such notice is provided. NTC may decrease the Product Price at any time by providing ALFA AESAR with 30 days prior written notice.
perturbation.justification: The modified text changes "Product Price" to "Retail Price" throughout Section 3.1, but then reverts to using "Product Price" at the end of the paragraph ("NTC may decrease the Product Price..."). This creates a direct in-text contradiction because the same section uses two different terms to refer to what is ostensibly the same thing (the price at which NTC sells to ALFA AESAR). This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' where using multiple terms interchangeably without defining them leads to conflicting obligations and uncertainty regarding which price is being referred to, creating confusion and potentially leading to disputes.

perturbation.original_text: 9.2. Subject to the protocol in Section 5.1, ALFA AESAR may return to NTC any Product that is defective or that fails to comply with the purchase order provided by ALFA AESAR. NTC shall return to ALFA AESAR as promptly as possible, a working replacement or, in the event such replacement is not possible or at ALFA AESAR's election, it shall credit ALFA AESAR's account for the invoiced price and shipping charges of the defective Product. The 6 correction of such defective Product shall be at no cost to ALFA AESAR. The cost of shipping the replacement Product back to ALFA AESAR shall be paid by NTC. THE CORRECTION OF SUCH DEFECT BY REPAIR OR CREDITING ALFA AESAR'S ACCOUNT FOR THE COST OF THE PRODUCT IN THE MANNER SET FORTH ABOVE SHALL CONSTITUTE THE SOLE AND EXCLUSIVE REMEDY OF DISTRIBUTOR WITH RESPECT TO ANY WARRANTY GIVEN HEREIN RELATING TO ANY PRODUCT SOLD OR DELIVERED HEREUNDER.
perturbation.changed_text: 9.2. Subject to the protocol in Section 5.1, ALFA AESAR may return to NTC any Item that is defective or that fails to comply with the purchase order provided by ALFA AESAR. NTC shall return to ALFA AESAR as promptly as possible, a working replacement or, in the event such replacement is not possible or at ALFA AESAR's election, it shall credit ALFA AESAR's account for the invoiced price and shipping charges of the defective Product. The 6 correction of such defective Product shall be at no cost to ALFA AESAR. The cost of shipping the replacement Product back to ALFA AESAR shall be paid by NTC. THE CORRECTION OF SUCH DEFECT BY REPAIR OR CREDITING ALFA AESAR'S ACCOUNT FOR THE COST OF THE PRODUCT IN THE MANNER SET FORTH ABOVE SHALL CONSTITUTE THE SOLE AND EXCLUSIVE REMEDY OF DISTRIBUTOR WITH RESPECT TO ANY WARRANTY GIVEN HEREIN RELATING TO ANY PRODUCT SOLD OR DELIVERED HEREUNDER.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Product' is changed to 'Item' at the beginning of the section. This creates an immediate in-text contradiction because the remainder of the paragraph refers to 'Product', and 'defective Product', and the 'cost of the Product' creating confusion as to if 'Item' and 'Product' are meant to be intechangeable or is a different thing.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9.2. Subject to the protocol in Section 5.1, ALFA AESAR may return to NTC any Item that is defective or that fails to comply with the purchase order provided by ALFA AESAR. NTC shall return to ALFA AESAR as promptly as possible, a working replacement or, in the event such replacement is not possible or at ALFA AESAR's election, it shall credit ALFA AESAR's account for the invoiced price and shipping charges of the defective Product. The 6 correction of such defective Product shall be at no cost to ALFA AESAR. The cost of shipping the replacement Product back to ALFA AESAR shall be paid by NTC. THE CORRECTION OF SUCH DEFECT BY REPAIR OR CREDITING ALFA AESAR'S ACCOUNT FOR THE COST OF THE PRODUCT IN THE MANNER SET FORTH ABOVE SHALL CONSTITUTE THE SOLE AND EXCLUSIVE REMEDY OF DISTRIBUTOR WITH RESPECT TO ANY WARRANTY GIVEN HEREIN RELATING TO ANY PRODUCT SOLD OR DELIVERED HEREUNDER.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Product' with 'Item' in the first sentence of Section 9.2, but the rest of the paragraph, including the sentence defining the sole and exclusive remedy, continues to use 'Product'. This creates a direct contradiction as to whether the remedy applies to 'Items' or only to 'Products'. This is a misalignment of terminology, as defined in the instructions.
